ptxt.intxrefpoff: Main Bearing, Crankshaft and Cylinder Block Removal and Installation

servinfosub.title: Distortion of Gasket Surface
servinfosub.ptxt: Using straightedge and feeler gauge, check gasket surface for distortion. If flatness exceeds its limit, repair it.
If repair is not possible, replace cylinder block.

s1.ptxt: When any cylinder needs reboring, all other cylinders must also be rebored at the same time.
Select oversize piston according to amount of cylinder wear.

spec.title: Oversize piston specification
spec.ptxt: Over size (0.50 mm (0.0197 in.)) (new piston with coating): 78.472 – 78.494 mm (3.0895 – 3.0903 in.)

s1.ptxt: Rebore and hone cylinder to the following dimension.

attention3.ptxt: Before reboring, install all main bearing caps in place and tighten to specification to avoid distortion of bearing bores.

spec.title: Cylinder bore diameter to be rebored

servinfosub.title: Venturi Plug Inspection
servinfosub.ptxt: Check that venturi plug passage is not clogged.
If venturi plug passage is clogged, clean or replace venturi plug.
